name: Shannon Airport (SNN)
content: The airport is located in Shannon, far outside of Limerick. The duty free store was invented here, and boy does the duty free store here take itself seriously. The airport itself is pleasant, with a good selection of cafes and regular buses to Limerick and other cities in Ireland. The U.S. military often uses this airport as a staging area, so may see large numbers of people in U.S. military uniforms here at times. The customs officers are very nice, Irish immigration and customs is generally a lot more understanding and less high-strung than their American counterparts. They have a great picture of JFK here as well.
